description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a BuildContainer job that runs hostname then builds a Docker image named ci/cloud9 with the command docker build -t ci/cloud9 . In the test stage add a StartContainer job that runs hostname, kills any running container named cloud9_test, removes any stopped container with that name, starts a new detached container named cloud9_test from the ci/cloud9 image using docker run --detach --name cloud9_test ci/cloud9, and finally lists all containers with docker ps -a. The pipeline does not define a global Docker image, services, caches, artifacts, or conditional rules, so all jobs run on any runner that has Docker installed.
